content:
💡 Alexandrie | Vue
🎯 Primary Use Case: Self-hosted knowledge management and team collaboration platform.
✨ Key Features: • One-Command Deployment (Docker) • Advanced Markdown Engine (LaTeX, custom containers, checkboxes, frames, snippets, diagrams) • Granular Organization (Teams, Workspaces, Categories, nested Documents) • Offline-First PWA with seamless synchronization • OpenID Connect (OIDC) SSO
📖 Summary: Alexandrie is an open-source, self-hosted knowledge base and wiki platform that serves as an alternative to tools like Notion and Confluence. It offers advanced Markdown editing, offline-first capabilities, team collaboration features, and robust security options like OIDC/SSO.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
